name: OpenClaw BitRouter Plugin
description: Route LLM requests through BitRouter — a local multi-provider proxy with failover, load balancing, and unified API key management.

port.description: Port for BitRouter to listen on.

host.description: Host address for BitRouter to bind to.

autoStart.description: Automatically start BitRouter daemon when OpenClaw starts.

healthCheckIntervalMs.description: Interval in ms between health check polls.

interceptAllModels.description: When true, route ALL model requests through BitRouter. When false (default), only intercept models that BitRouter has configured routes for.

providers.description: Provider configurations. Keys are provider names (e.g. 'openai', 'anthropic'). Values configure API keys, base URLs, and inheritance.

apiKey.description: API key or env var reference like '${OPENAI_API_KEY}'.

envPrefix.description: Env var prefix for auto-loading keys (e.g. 'OPENAI').

derives.description: Inherit defaults from a built-in provider (e.g. 'openai').

guardrails.description: Content guardrail configuration. Scans outbound/inbound traffic for sensitive patterns.

upgoing.description: Per-pattern action for outbound traffic (user → LLM).

downgoing.description: Per-pattern action for inbound traffic (LLM → user).

models.description: Model routing definitions. Keys are virtual model names. Values define routing strategy and endpoint lists.

strategy.description: 'priority' tries endpoints in order with failover. 'load_balance' distributes via round-robin.

provider.description: Provider name (must be configured in providers section or a built-in).

modelId.description: Upstream model ID to send to this provider.

apiBase.description: Optional per-endpoint API base URL override.

solanaRpcUrl.description: Solana RPC URL for on-chain operations (Swig wallet, x402 payments).

cloud.description: Cloud-specific configuration for BitRouter Cloud mode.

solanaRpcUrl.description: Solana RPC URL override for cloud mode.

mode.description: Setup mode. 'auto' = detected from environment variables. 'byok' = bring your own API key (wizard). 'cloud' = Swig wallet for x402 payments. Unset = not yet configured and no env vars found.

byok.description: BYOK upstream provider configuration. Set automatically by the setup wizard.

apiBase.description: Custom API base URL. Defaults to the provider's public URL.

providerAuthChoices.choiceHint: Pay-per-use via Swig wallet — no API keys needed

providerAuthChoices.choiceLabel: BYOK — bring your own API key
providerAuthChoices.choiceHint: Route through OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, or any compatible API
providerAuthChoices.cliDescription: Upstream provider API key for BYOK mode

mode.label: Setup Mode
mode.help: Set by the first-run wizard. Run: openclaw models auth login --provider bitrouter

byok.label: BYOK Provider Config
byok.help: Upstream provider settings configured via the BYOK wizard.
